name: 7_centromere_pericentric_SD
description: Chr7 pericentromeric region containing alpha-satellite higher-order repeat array (D7Z1/D7Z2) plus flanking pericentromeric SDs rich in NPIP/NBPF-like duplicons and POM121 paralogs. Highly variable between haplotypes; CHM13-T2T resolves the active alpha-satellite higher-order repeat that GRCh38 represents as a gap.

architecture.internal_structure: Alpha-satellite D7Z1 array (~3 Mb in CHM13) flanked by pericentromeric SD mosaic; GRCh38 contains placeholder N-gap, CHM13 has full assembly.
